content.speakerText: Can I get two pounds of grapes, please?
expectedAnswers: Of course — I'll grab a bunch for you.
Two pounds? Got it. I'll pick the ripest ones.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应称重要求并提供选择
语言准确性：使用正确量词和口语表达（如 'Sure thing'）
表达自然度：语气友好，符合日常购物语境
关键词覆盖：包含 'pounds', 'grapes', 'red/green' 等场景词

content.speakerText: I'll take these apples — but can you pick the juiciest ones?
content.speakerTextCn: 我要这些苹果，但能挑最汁多的吗？
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! These are the sweetest in stock.
Sure, I'll hand-pick the best for you.
Of course — I'll choose the ones with the deepest color; they're the juiciest.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：积极回应挑选请求并提供质量保证
语言准确性：使用 'hand-pick', 'sweetest in stock' 等恰当表达
表达自然度：语气热情，符合优质服务场景
关键词覆盖：包含 'juiciest', 'pick', 'best', 'sweetest' 等核心词
